raw.description: This is a frontend project to showcase web frontend skills.
The purpose of the assessment is to assess the web frontend skills required for the job. The software written is for assessment purposes only.

The purpose of the assessment is to assess the web frontend skills required for the job. The software written is for assessment purposes only. It should be hosted on a code repository service (e.g Github, Gitlab) with public access to make the assessment easy

Anti-slop web frontend skill for AI coding agents. Auto-trigger every web task. Force Kimi/Lovable-tier quality with Discovery Form + 5 deterministic directions + 27 anti-patterns + ready-to-paste hero/section/motion blueprints. Distilled from open-design, taste-skill, impeccable.style, getdesign.md, kimi.com, lovable.dev.
